hero_image.placement: Generate this first. Use for image-to-video (hydraulic barrage). Output becomes videoserver.mp4

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. No template. This will be animated to video.
prompt.subject: A massive concrete dam spillway releasing a wall of water. The spillway stretches toward a vanishing point. Mist and spray fill the air.
prompt.camera: Low angle, 24mm anamorphic, looking up at the water cascade
prompt.scene: Concrete spillway, massive water release, mist and spray, sun just above the horizon behind the water
prompt.lighting: Golden hour, volumetric god rays through the mist, cool steel blue water against warm amber sky

cinematography.color: cinematic, cool steel blue and warm amber, slightly desaturated
cinematography.lens_effects: BOLD anamorphic lens flare from sun, crisp hexagonal bokeh, same style as X banner images
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp focus, pristine clarity, razor-sharp edges
cinematography.mood: vast, industrial, raw power, energy infrastructure

prompt.note: Frame has strong depth and vanishing point—ideal for image-to-video forward motion

hero_video.placement: Hero section, top-right block, 35vw x 45vh, clip-corner-bl
hero_video.kling3_prompt: Steady linear pan left. The camera drifts left at constant speed, smooth and mechanical. Gentle push-in, subtle zoom in. The hydraulic barrage and water remain anchored; only the frame moves. Cinematic, no shake, no jitter. Shot on 35mm anamorphic.
hero_video.negative_prompt: shaky, jittery, floating, sliding, morphing, warp

about_hero.placement: About section, full-width 16:9 between statement and architecture stack

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. No template. Realistic, no buildings.
prompt.subject: Close-up of a real solar farm. Rows of photovoltaic panels stretch diagonally across the frame. Glass reflections catch the light on each panel.
prompt.camera: Low angle tracking along the array, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field on foreground panels
prompt.scene: Concrete footings, cables, dust on the glass surface. Arid landscape in the background.
prompt.lighting: Golden hour, sun low on the horizon behind the panels

cinematography.color: cinematic, warm amber and steel, realistic, desaturated
cinematography.lens_effects: BOLD anamorphic lens flare from sun, crisp hexagonal bokeh, same style as X banner images
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp, ultra detail, pristine clarity

prompt.negative: blue building, glowing cube, data center, fake structures, CGI, cartoon

about_energy.placement: Energy-first card, background at 20% opacity, dark overlay

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. Will be used as subtle background (low opacity).
prompt.subject: A close-up of steel lattice power transmission towers. Three high-voltage cables run diagonally across the frame. The towers are weathered, rust on the metal, concrete bases visible at the base.
prompt.camera: Close-up, shallow depth of field, foreground tower sharp, background slightly soft
prompt.scene: Overcast sky, soft natural light. Sun breaks through a gap in the clouds creating a crisp lens flare in the upper third.
prompt.lighting: Overcast, natural light, one strong point source for lens flare

cinematography.color: muted, works when darkened to 20% opacity

prompt.negative: control room, monitors, screens, graphs, smart meter, abstract, CGI, glowing, fake

features_heading_option_1_substation.placement: Features section, beside headline 'Four mechanisms…' (replace video or alternate asset), 16:9, clip-corner-bl

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. No template. Documentary, cinematic. Real electrical infrastructure.
prompt.subject: A high-voltage electrical substation in real life. Ceramic insulators, steel gantries, busbars, switchgear, gravel yard, warning signs. Weathered metal, oil stains, real industrial wear.
prompt.camera: Medium-wide shot, slight low angle, 35mm anamorphic. Deep depth of field so foreground insulators and distant structures read clearly. Leading lines from cables and gantries.
prompt.scene: Overcast daylight or soft sun. No workers required. Chain-link fence, concrete pads, distant transmission lines. Everything physically real and grounded.
prompt.lighting: Natural daylight, soft shadows. Optional single crisp sun break for one anamorphic lens flare—same family as hero dam and solar prompts.

cinematography.color: realistic industrial palette—gray steel, off-white ceramic, muted sky. Documentary grading, slightly desaturated. No teal-orange blockbuster look.
cinematography.lens_effects: crisp anamorphic flare only if sun visible; otherwise clean glass
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp, ultra detail, pristine clarity, razor-sharp edges
cinematography.mood: precision, layered infrastructure, ‘mechanisms’ as real hardware—pairs with copy about eliminating complexity

prompt.negative: hologram, HUD, glowing screens, data overlay, sci-fi UI, neon, CGI, cartoon, floating graphs, server room close-up of LEDs, fake structures, oversaturated

features_heading_option_2_fiber_backbone.placement: Features section, beside headline 'Four mechanisms…', 16:9, clip-corner-bl

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. Documentary. Real telecommunications / fiber backbone—no abstract network graphics.
prompt.subject: Heavy armored fiber-optic cable on large wooden or steel reels at a civil works site, or cables entering a weathered underground vault with conduit and warning markers. Mud, asphalt, real tools, cable markings visible but not readable as fake UI.
prompt.camera: Close-to-medium shot, 35mm or 50mm, shallow depth of field on cable texture and reel edge, background softly falling off.
prompt.scene: Daylight, roadside or utility trench context. Orange safety fencing optional. Dust, rubber marks, real-world imperfection.
prompt.lighting: Natural diffuse light or golden hour sidelight grazing the cable jacket texture.

cinematography.color: cinematic, warm-neutral and steel, realistic, slightly desaturated—consistent with solar and tower prompts
cinematography.lens_effects: BOLD anamorphic lens flare from low sun if appropriate, crisp hexagonal bokeh
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp on foreground cable and reel
cinematography.mood: distributed connectivity, physical backbone, engineering realism

prompt.negative: glowing nodes, world map, digital network, matrix, blue cyber lines, CGI, abstract fiber light trails, server racks with rainbow LEDs, fake

features_heading_option_3_wind_grid.placement: Features section, beside headline 'Four mechanisms…', 16:9, clip-corner-bl

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. Wind energy meeting the grid—same documentary language as solar farm prompt.
prompt.subject: Onshore wind turbines on a real access road or service track, with a high-voltage transmission line and lattice tower in the same frame. Grass, gravel, turbine bases, real scale. Steam or mist optional in distance only if natural weather.
prompt.camera: Wide shot, low horizon, 24mm or 35mm anamorphic. Turbines and power lines create strong verticals and depth toward the horizon.
prompt.scene: Windy but believable sky—scudding clouds, not apocalyptic. No people necessary.
prompt.lighting: Golden hour or soft overcast; volumetric light through clouds if sun breaks—god rays subtle, natural only.

cinematography.color: cinematic, cool sky and warm land accents, realistic, desaturated
cinematography.lens_effects: BOLD anamorphic lens flare from sun at edge of frame, crisp hexagonal bokeh, match hero/solar family
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp, ultra detail, pristine clarity
cinematography.mood: renewable generation feeding the grid—aligns with mica energy-aware training story

prompt.negative: floating turbines, fake turbines, CGI, oversaturated, apocalyptic storm, lightning, destruction, neon, hologram, cartoon

features_hero.placement: Features section, 16:9 hero between heading and cards

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. No template. Documentary, cinematic.
prompt.subject: A nuclear power station. Massive concrete cooling towers with steam rising into the sky. Or: reactor containment building, turbine hall exterior, industrial scale. Real infrastructure—concrete, steel, pipes, power lines.
prompt.camera: Wide establishing shot, low angle looking up at the towers, 35mm anamorphic. Deep depth of field. Vanishing point through the structure.
prompt.scene: Overcast or soft daylight. Steam plumes, cooling water vapor. Gravel, fencing, transmission lines. No people needed—the scale speaks.
prompt.lighting: Natural daylight, overcast or soft sun. Realistic shadows. One crisp lens flare if sun breaks through clouds.

cinematography.color: realistic, natural palette—concrete gray, steel, sky blue, steam white. No teal/orange push. Documentary color grading, slightly muted.
cinematography.lens_effects: crisp anamorphic lens flare if sun visible, otherwise clean
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp, ultra detail, pristine clarity, razor-sharp edges
cinematography.mood: vast, industrial, documentary realism, crisp cinematic

prompt.negative: hologram, neon, glowing, fake, CGI, apocalyptic, destruction, cartoon, oversaturated, teal-orange

cta_bg.placement: CTA section, full-bleed background, blurred, 30% opacity

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. Will be used as blurred background behind dark overlay.
prompt.subject: A low industrial building at blue hour. Concrete and steel construction. Warm amber light spills from a single large door in the center of the frame.
prompt.scene: The building sits in an empty lot, gravel ground. Overcast sky, dusk.
prompt.lighting: Blue hour, overcast sky, warm interior light from the door creating a subtle lens flare

cinematography.color: muted, cool tones, one warm accent, will show through dark overlay
cinematography.lens_effects: crisp lens flare from one light source
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp in source (blur applied in CSS)

prompt.negative: sleek, neon, cool blue lights, CGI, fake, glowing

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. No template. Documentary, cinematic. Drone/aerial view of Amazon rainforest with energy infrastructure.
prompt.subject: Drone aerial view of Amazonian rainforest. Dense canopy stretches to the horizon. A wide river cuts through the frame—the same water that feeds hydroelectric dams. Or: high-voltage transmission towers and power lines cutting through the canopy, carrying energy from Amazon hydro. Or: a reservoir or dam visible in the distance, forest meeting water. The connection: this landscape powers the grid.
prompt.camera: Drone POV, high altitude, looking down at 30–45 degrees. 24mm equivalent. Deep depth of field. River or power corridor creates strong leading lines. Vast scale—canopy as a textured carpet.
prompt.scene: Primary forest, river visible. Transmission lines or dam structure in frame (subtle, not dominant). Mist over the canopy. No people. Real infrastructure—towers, cables, or concrete—grounded in the landscape.
prompt.lighting: Golden hour or soft overcast. Sun low, long shadows across the canopy. Volumetric light through mist. One crisp lens flare if sun at edge of frame.

cinematography.color: cinematic, deep greens, steel-gray towers or concrete if present, warm amber sky, slightly desaturated, documentary grading
cinematography.lens_effects: BOLD anamorphic lens flare from sun if visible, crisp hexagonal bokeh, same style as X banner images
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp focus, ultra detail, pristine clarity, razor-sharp edges
cinematography.mood: vast, primordial, energy meets nature, documentary realism, Planet Earth meets infrastructure

prompt.negative: hologram, neon, glowing, CGI, cartoon, oversaturated, fake plants, plastic look, people, buildings, deforestation, logging, no energy connection

_style_reference.crisp: 8K crisp, tack-sharp focus, ultra detail, pristine clarity, razor-sharp edges
_style_reference.lens_flare: BOLD anamorphic lens flare, crisp hexagonal bokeh, same style as X banner images
_style_reference.rule: Realistic only. No abstract, no control rooms, no glowing screens, no fake structures, no CGI look. Documentary realism.
